name: Amortization of Corporate Mineral and Drilling Costs

eligibility.description: Available to corporations (specifically integrated oil companies for IDCs) incurring costs under sections 263(c), 616(a), or 617(a).

description: While 30% of intangible drilling costs and mineral exploration costs are disallowed as immediate deductions for corporations, these amounts can be amortized ratably over a 60-month period.
